name: Ahmad Jamal
abstract: Ahmad Jamal (born Frederick Russell Jones; July 2, 1930 – April 16, 2023) was an American jazz pianist, composer, bandleader, and educator. For six decades, he was one of the most successful small-group leaders in jazz.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: We did a recording of standards, because we wanted to deal more with the standard repertoire of playing trios, like Oscar Peterson or Ahmad Jamal.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: The first record I remember hearing live was Ahmad Jamal “Live at the Pershing”
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 25, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Norman Simmons
about_quotes.evidence: I have to go like influence. And I’d have to say that was Ahmad Jamal... he was so effective. He was one of the like what you’d call a prophet in your own hometown... When he came to Chicago he came from Pittsburgh... When he formed his first trio... they had something goin’ on there that was unbeli
about_quotes.doc_title: Norman Simmons interviewed by Michael Woods, Majesty of the Seas, May 30, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Dawoud Sabu Adeyola
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer lists Ahmad Jamal among people the interviewee 'collaborated with'. The interviewee confirms working with him: 'when I got with him he was filling up those spaces more' and 'I was working with... Ahmad... we rehearsed a lot'.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dawoud Sabu Adeyola interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 30, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: I looked up, and who should be sitting at the bar but Ahmad Jamal? “Hi, Ramsey.” Shoot. Busted. I was so embarrassed. We came off stage, and he was just grinning. He was just laughing. It was fun.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John Levy
about_quotes.evidence: Originally I did have agreements – written agreements with Ahmad Jamal... I represented the package and worked with him on different things and did make – I made earnings on his recordings
about_quotes.doc_title: John Levy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
